acceptance.assertion: Captain preflight computes a deterministic actions_sha256 over normalized requested actions.
Each Captain action exposes a deterministic target_sha256 in its receipt.
Review, CI, human authorization, execution authority, and status projection evidence can be checked against action or target digests and mismatches fail closed.

goal: Add deterministic action/target digest binding for Captain evidence so review, CI, human authorization, execution authority, and status projection can be tied to the exact requested high-impact envelope.

metadata.reason: PR #97 validates structure but does not cryptographically bind all evidence objects to the requested action envelope.

validated_acceptance.actions-digest: Captain preflight/run outputs expose actions_sha256. It is computed deterministically over normalized action records containing index, action, action_sha256 and target_sha256; action_sha256 includes target, scope, target_change_required, target_change, risk, irreversibility_record and receipt_path.
validated_acceptance.evidence-bound: status_projection, execution_authority, review_evidence, ci_evidence and human_authorization may carry actions_sha256/action_sha256/target_sha256. Invalid or mismatched digests block both the central evidence-digest-bound gate and the relevant evidence gate.
validated_acceptance.target-digest: Each Captain action record, envelope and captain_receipt exposes target_sha256; tests assert the values match.

validation.ci: GitHub validate (3.10) and validate (3.12) completed SUCCESS for PR #126.
validation.external_review: Initial external agy review BLOCK led to explicit _captain_action_index and envelope index binding. Rerun external agy review PASS, finding_count=0, head_sha=dc0312db3f1ea9c457339164645d35ae57db217c.
validation.grabowski_pr: heimgewebe/grabowski#126 merged via squash at 2761100fb1df8eee6779e19d3a0b692092e491ac with head dc0312db3f1ea9c457339164645d35ae57db217c.
validation.local_tests: tests/test_grips.py: 140 passed, 37 subtests passed; make validate: 720 tests OK on final head.
non_claims: Does not add new Captain executable actions.
Does not add merge, deploy, service restart, fleet mutation, cleanup or secret authority.
Digest matching binds evidence to an envelope; it does not prove semantic correctness or production safety.
Existing evidence without digest fields remains backward-compatible; provided mismatching digest fields fail closed.
validation.review_gate: tools/pr_review_gate.py PASS for PR #126 with self-review and external agy evidence; diff_sha256=a853438521fdaa7e40f32c0f7aa9189e5e7fe13dfca42490ff3131b3f49f8471.
validation.runtime_deploy: Scheduled deploy job grabowski-job-66007e73aecb logs report PASS and repo_head 2761100fb1df8eee6779e19d3a0b692092e491ac. grabowski_status confirms runtime at that head with provenance_valid and runtime_binding_valid.

metadata.verification_note: Captain evidence now exposes deterministic action, target and action-set digests and fails closed when supplied evidence digest fields are bound to a different envelope.

title: Bind Captain evidence to action and target digests
